description_long: This storage locker is a rectangular, single-story structure with a dark brown, gabled roof and red-brown walls bordered by dark gray trim. The front side features a single door and a window, while the other long side has two windows. Both shorter ends of the building display two windows each, symmetrically placed and framed by the same dark trim. The windows are rectangular with a grid pattern, suggesting reinforced glass or metal bars for security. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, suitable for protecting stored items from weather and unauthorized access. The materials and design indicate it is intended for outdoor use, likely in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A rectangular, red-brown storage locker with a dark gabled roof, multiple grid-patterned windows, and a single front door, bordered by dark trim.
description_view_0: This view shows a long side with two grid-patterned windows and no visible door.
description_view_1: This end view displays two symmetrically placed windows and the gabled roof peak.
description_view_2: This view reveals the front with a single door and one window, both bordered by dark trim.
description_view_3: This end view mirrors view 1, showing two windows and the gabled roof peak.
